item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: How Edward Snowden made us think about and forget the Insider Threat
item.description: Five years ago, the news media went into a frenzy after The Guardian revealed details about National Security Agency (NSA) surveillance activities.

item.title: California Data Breach Reporting Rate Decreases 59 Percent in First Half of 2018; Negligent Employees, Human Errors Continue to Cause Breaches
item.description: The number of data breaches reported by organizations required to file notices on the California State Attorney General's website dropped significantly between the second half of 2017 and the first half of 2018.

item.title: Layers and Telemetry — What We Can Learn from the Stanford University Breach
item.description: DTEX VP of Product Engineering explores why breaches like the Stanford University breach continue to happen.

item.title: DTEX Partners with Leading Cybersecurity Companies & the Australian Government to Cultivate Talent
item.description: DTEX has partnered with the Australian Government, along with Splunk and CrowdStrike to support the growth of talent in cybersecurity.

item.title: macOS Monterey Demonstrates Apple’s Commitment to User Privacy & Enterprise Workforce Security
item.description: Since other Insider Risk & DLP vendors relied heavily on kernel extensions, they are now unable to provide a fully-featured macOS enterprise product.

item.title: Long Overdue: Shedding Legacy Employee Monitoring Technology to Effectively Manage Insider Threats
item.description: The employees who understand how their organizations generate & use data will be in a better position to understand what activities are potentially harmful.

item.title: Microsoft Hack an Example of Insider Threat? Yes. TransUnion Gets Serious About Insider Threat
item.description: Insider threat or not? That seems to be the questions surrounding a recent breach that struck Microsoft between January and March. Let's take a look.

item.title: 3 Ways to Take Control of Your Cyber Security Career in 2022
item.description: The cyber security industry is a hot job market. Read tips from our team on getting started and putting your career in the right direction.

item.title: Case Study: DTEX Provides Visibility and Context to Global Materials Company
item.description: DTEX provided the visibility and context to detect, deter and defend against unsanctioned data use and movement.

item.title: Time to Value for Insider Risk Management is Key to Adoption & Success
item.description: Time to value is critical for organizations. IRM solutions like the DTEX Platform offer faster TTV than surveillance solutions.

item.title: What Is User & Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA)?
item.description: Learn what is User & Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) alongside the differences between outdated Indicators of Compromise vs. modern Indicators of Intent.

item.title: Major US Lending Company Chooses DTEX to Mitigate Insider Risk
item.description: One of the largest lending institutions in North America has taken a major step toward mitigating insider risk.

item.title: 5 Key Areas to Help Measure your Insider Risk Program Effectiveness
item.description: So how do we go about measuring the efficacy of an insider risk program? Here are five key areas to focus one's attention.

item.title: DTEX Insider Risk Assessment Development Strategy for Partners
item.description: DTEX has developed a 3-week Insider Risk Assessment that can be leveraged by partners to begin building their insider risk practice.

item.title: DTEX C-InT Brief: Up to 60% of Employees Research or Trade Cryptocurrency on Corporate Devices
item.description: While cryptocurrency clearly will have its place in the world economy, it’s important that people understand the risk of engaging with it through corporate devices.

item.title: Dtex Announces $17.5M Funding led by Northgate Capital
item.description: The widespread decision corporations have made to allow employees to WFH is a great thing for business & humanity but it must be done safely for cyber security.

item.title: Snapchat Report Highlights Insider Threats as Top Challenge for Privacy; Employee Mistakes Named Top Data Security Threat in Hong Kong and Taiwan
item.description: News headlines this week reveal employee data abuse at Snapchat, and employee mistakes were noted as top security threat in HK and Taiwan.

item.title: Monday, May 14: A look at the Insider Threat and Dtex in the News
item.description: It's only Monday. Like clockwork, we are seeing another data breach that now appears to be the result of a malicious insider.

item.title: Privileged User Monitoring: A Critical Piece of Insider Threat Prevention
item.description: Privileged user monitoring is a critical piece of insider threat prevention. Here's how you can develop an effective super user risk management plan.

item.title: The Insider Threat Kill Chain: 5 Steps to Watch Out For
item.description: As a company that's been fighting the insider threat for more than 15 years, we've been in the game long enough to identify distinct trends in insider behavior.

item.title: Call Center Cyber Security & Insider Threats: How to Stop
item.description: Call centers are unique branches of an enterprise with 1 especially-dangerous security risk. You can't overlook insider threat, and here's how to beat it.

item.title: How We Assessed & Mitigated TeamViewer’s Security Risk in Minutes
item.description: No professional likes to wake up only to hear news that a common development tool has been compromised. Learn how we solved TeamViewer's security risk here.

item.title: GDPR Countdown Series: Minding the (Knowledge) Gap, and Working to Close It
item.description: If you're reading this, there is a good chance that you're keenly aware that Europe's impending General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is just around the corner.

item.title: Dtex Platform Updates: Delivering Scalable, Cloud-Ready Insider Threat Detection
item.description: Here at DTEX, we introduced product updates aimed at making our Advanced User Behavior Intelligence platform even more comprehensive, flexible & scalable.

item.title: Decoding the Evolution of Insider Threats: The ESG Insider Threat Program Realities Report
item.description: Over the years, we have conducted hundreds of insider threat assessments and have investigated too many insider incidents to count. Learn our lessons here.

item.title: Analyst Breach Insights, Week of November 20: Undetected Breaches, Accidental Exposure, and VPN Risks
item.description: In this week’s analyst insights, we discuss 4 breaches which lead us from the topics of anti malware to threat intelligence to publicly accessible data and more.

item.title: Smile, You’re On Camera! Lack of User Behavior Monitoring Leaves Verkada Exposed
item.description: See how a lack of UEBA at Verkada compromised the company and the privacy of its employees.

item.title: Five Key Lessons from the Uber/Waymo Litigation
item.description: We've witnessed one of the most high-profile lawsuits in recent history, alleging Uber used Google/Waymo's self-driving car IP to further its own tech development.

item.title: Telecommunications
item.description: DTEX works with telecommunications companies to uplift insider risk management and protect sensitive data.
